title: Buzz 600pk Bathroom Anti-Bac Wipes, Antibacterial Toilet Cleaning Sheets, Ultra-Strong Large Multi-Surface Cloths for Floors, Desk, Kitchen, Soap Scum Remover, Household Disinfectant
features: Ultra Strong, Anti Bacterial Wpies - Buzz antibacterial wipes are designed to provide excellent cleaning performance without the fuss. They won't fall apart easily and will provide consistent and effective anti bac cleaning results.
Kills 99.9% of All Bacteria – This cleaning wipes antibacterial kill 99.9% of all bacteria including MRSA, E.coli & Salmonella. Our antiseptic wipes are safe to use on a variety of surfaces.

Helps Prevent Limescale - Buzz bathroom wipes have been engineered specifically for use in a bathroom. They cut through dirt, grease and soap scum and can be used on baths, sinks, showers and the toilet, to keep them fresh and prevent the build up of limescale.
Convenient & Resealable Pack – Easy-to-use pack keeps wipes moist and ready for whenever you need a quick clean-up.

Compact & Portable Pack – These wet wipes are perfect for home or on-the-go use. Ideal for quick clean-ups as toilet wipes, wet floor wipes, and more, they help keep your living spaces spotless anytime, anywhere.
description: Toilet Cleaning Wipes, 600 Sheets, Multipurpose Toilet Wipes, Kitchen Sink and Tile Cleaning, Ultra Strong Bathroom Cleaning Wipes for Dirt and Grime, All Around Kitchen Towels, 12 Pack
